title: Simplify main setup page to summary cards with links to subpages
goal: 설정 메인 페이지를 심플한 요약 카드 뷰로 바꾼다. 모바일 연결과 AI 키 설정은 메인에 유지하고, External connections/Permissions/Tools 섹션은 상태 요약 카드 + '자세히 보기' 링크로 대체한다.

test_requirements.case: Main page has summary card for connections
test_requirements.expected: card shows connected count like 0/2 연결됨 with link to /setup/connections

test_requirements.case: Main page has summary card for permissions
test_requirements.expected: card shows allowed count like 5/12 허용됨 with link to /setup/permissions

test_requirements.case: Main page has summary card for tools
test_requirements.expected: card shows tool status with link to /setup/tools

test_requirements.case: Mobile and AI sections remain on main page
test_requirements.expected: tunnel and API key UI unchanged

test_requirements.case: Detailed connection UI removed from main page
test_requirements.expected: no individual Gmail/Calendar cards on main

test_requirements.case: Detailed permission toggles removed from main page
test_requirements.expected: no individual permission switches on main

constraints: Keep mobile tunnel section (모바일 연결) fully on main page
Keep AI key section (AI 설정) fully on main page
Replace External connections section with summary card → link to /setup/connections
Replace Permissions section with summary card → link to /setup/permissions
Replace Tools + MCP section with summary card → link to /setup/tools
Remove custom connectors from main page (move to /setup/connections)
Summary cards: icon + title + status count + 자세히 보기 button
Use t() for all text, add new translation keys
